projects.name: groupie-tracker
projects.summary: A Go web application that explores artist data with search, filters, geolocation, and visualizations.
projects.cv_summary: Built a Go web application with search, filtering, geolocation, visualization features, and structured data handling.
highlights: HTTP server and template rendering in Go
Search, filters, geolocation, and visualization features
projects.notes: Best first public candidate. Present the full groupie-tracker family as one complete project.

projects.name: net-cat
projects.summary: A TCP chat/server project focused on client connections, concurrency, and terminal-based workflows.
projects.cv_summary: Implemented a TCP-based client/server application in Go with concurrent connection handling and terminal interaction.

projects.name: lem-in
projects.summary: A graph/pathfinding project that routes ants through rooms while optimizing movement over available paths.
projects.cv_summary: Solved a graph optimization problem using parsing, pathfinding, and movement scheduling logic.
projects.notes: Good problem-solving signal once README explains the algorithm clearly.

projects.name: push-swap
projects.summary: A constrained sorting project focused on minimizing operations with two stacks.
projects.cv_summary: Built a constrained sorting solution that minimizes operations using stack-based algorithms.
highlights: Clear input validation and error handling
projects.notes: Worth showing after README polish with examples and operation-count notes.

projects.name: tetris-optimizer
projects.summary: A placement optimizer that packs tetromino-style pieces into the smallest valid square.
projects.cv_summary: Implemented a backtracking optimizer for constrained piece placement.

projects.name: ascii-art-web-dockerize
projects.summary: A containerized Go web project that serves ASCII-art generation through a browser interface.
projects.cv_summary: Containerized a Go web application with Docker and browser-based interaction.
projects.notes: Useful as supporting evidence for Docker/web fundamentals.

projects.name: forum
projects.summary: A full-stack forum platform planned as the strongest future portfolio project once complete.
projects.cv_summary: Full-stack forum platform with authentication, persistence, and user-generated content.
projects.notes: Do not feature yet. Promote when stable, documented, and safe to publish.
